<?php namespace Illuminate\Mail\Mailables; class Address { /** * The recipient's email address. * * @var string */ public $address; /** * The recipient's name. * * @var string|null */ public $name; /** * Create a new address instance. * * @param string $address * @param string|null $name */ public function __construct(string $address, ?string $name = null) { $this->address = $address; $this->name = $name; } }
